_meta.name: ucum_common
_meta.title: UCUM — Unified Code for Units of Measure (common subset)
_meta.source: UCUM (Regenstrief) common clinical/lab and general units (documented subset)
_meta.disclaimer: A documented subset of common UCUM unit atoms used in clinical/lab and general measurement. It is NOT the full UCUM grammar (which supports arbitrary unit expressions). UCUM codes are CASE-SENSITIVE; load this set with normalizer='exact'.
